fields.question: you have an opted to be part of our talent pool. by being part of our talent pool you may be contacted by someone in pale blue dot recruitment in relation to similar roles or opportunities that we feel may be of interest to you. your details will be maintained as part of our privacy policy found on this website and our company website (https://pbdrecruit.ie/privacy-policy/) and (https://pbdrecruit.ie/terms-of-service-for-candidates/). these policies incorporate the requirements of general data protection regulation (eu) 2016/679. do you hereby agree to the terms and conditions laid out in privacy policy and terms of service for candidates of pale blue dot® recruitment.?
